name: Deland Park
description: Deland Park is a place to play pickleball in Sheboygan, WI. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Generations, an Intergenerational Center
description: Generations, an Intergenerational Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Plymouth, WI. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Glenbeulah High School
description: Come play pickleball at Glenbeulah High School in Elkhart Lake, WI! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Kiwanis Park
description: Kiwanis Park is a place to play pickleball in Sheboygan, WI. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility is wheelchair accessible. The courts are free.

name: Mullet River Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Mullet River Tennis Courts in Plymouth, WI! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Oostburg Christian School
description: Oostburg Christian School is a place to play pickleball in Oostburg, WI. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Random Lake Entertainment District Pickleball Courts
description: Indoor court rental.  Cafe/Coffee shop on site (Mon-Sat, Breakfast and Lunch) and Full Bar (during certain hours).
fees: Fee required — $20/Hour Court Rental or $5/person during scheduled open play times.

name: Uptown Social
description: Uptown Social is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sheboygan, WI. There is 1 indoor court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

description: 3 dedicated pickleball courts, 2 tennis courts with painted pickleball lines on court.
